<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardkonyn (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gī-māu]][[de:Erde-Hase]][[fr:Lièvre de terre]][[hak:Kí-mâu]][[ja:己卯]][[ko:기묘]][[nds:Eer-Haas]][[vi:Kỷ Mão]][[za:Geijmaux]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-báu]][[zh-yue:己卯]][[zh:己卯]]

'''Yin Earth Rabbit also known as 己卯''' (tsuchinotou, kidonousagi, kidonou, kibou) is one of the elements of the [[Sexagenary cycle]].

It is the 16th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle]], preceded by [[Yang Earth Tiger]] and followed by [[Yang Metal Dragon]]. In the framework of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[Heavenly Stems]] symbol [[Tsuchinoto (己)]] represents yin [[Earth (wuxing)|Earth (土)]], while the [[Earthly Branches]] symbol [[Rabbit (zodiac)|Rabbit (卯)]] represents yin [[Wood (wuxing)|Wood (木)]], establishing a restraining relationship ([[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)]]) (i.e. Wood overcomes Earth).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Earth Rabbit (己卯)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐmǎo
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 maau5
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-u
***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-u
***Kunyomi 3: Kido-no-usagi
***Onyomi 1: kimi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gimyo (기묘)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Mão

==Years of Yin Earth Rabbit==
A year in the [[Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 19 when divided by 60 is a [[Year|year]] of [[Yin Earth Rabbit]].
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Yin Earth Rabbit (己卯)'s years table'''
|-
! [[1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]]
|-
|
* [[AD 19|19 AD]]
* [[AD 79|79 AD]]
* [[AD 139|139 AD]]
* [[199|199 AD]]
* [[259|259 AD]]
* [[319|319 AD]]
* [[379|379 AD]]
* [[439|439 AD]]
* [[499|499 AD]]
* [[559|559 AD]]
* [[619|619 AD]]
* [[AD 679|679 AD]]
* [[739|739 AD]]
* [[799|799 AD]]
* [[859|859 AD]]
* [[919|919 AD]]
* [[979|979 AD]]
|
* [[1039|1039 AD]]
* [[1099|1099 AD]]
* [[1159|1159 AD]]
* [[1219|1219 AD]]
* [[1279|1279 AD]]
* [[1339|1339 AD]]
* [[1399|1399 AD]]
* [[1459|1459 AD]]
* [[1519|1519 AD]]
* [[1579|1579 AD]]
* [[1639|1639 AD]]
* [[1699|1699 AD]]
* [[1759|1759 AD]]
* [[1819|1819 AD]]
* [[1879|1879 AD]]
* [[1939|1939 AD]]
* [[1999|1999 AD]]
|
* [[2059 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2119 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2179 AD]]
* [[23rd century|2239 AD]]
* [[23rd century|2299 AD]]
* [[2359 AD]]
* [[25th century|2419 AD]]
* [[2479 AD]]
* [[2539 AD]]
* [[2599 AD]]
* [[2659 AD]]
* [[2719 AD]]
* [[2779 AD]]
* [[2839 AD]]
* [[2899 AD]]
* [[2959 AD]]
|}
==Months of Yin Earth Rabbit==
In a [[Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[Heavenly Stems]] are [[Kanoe (庚)]] or [[Kinoto (乙)]]), the month of [[February]] is designated as the [[Month|month (calendar)]] of [[Yin Earth Rabbit]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] or to the [[Solar term]] (from [[Jingzhe|Awakening of Insects]] until the day before [[Qingming (solar term)|Qingming]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Earth Rabbit==
The [[Senjitsu]] for [[Yin Earth Rabbit]] is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
The day of [[Yin Earth Rabbit]] is the 2nd day of [[Tsuchi (Japanese term)|Small Earth]].

==See Also==
<!--Yin Earth Rabbit--><!--Yin Earth Rabbit-->

{{wikidata link|Q1062557}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
